_meta.description: Category landing page section templates for tmw_category_page TemplatePool generation. v1.1.0 adds keyword-enriched variants (intro_10, covers_09, who_09, tips_09, similar_09, close_09) using {{secondary_keywords}} and {{content_terms}} placeholders. These resolve to empty string when no approved pool keywords exist, preserving v1.0.0 fallback behavior.

placeholders.{{category_name}}: Display name of the category (e.g. Blonde Webcam Models)
placeholders.{{category_slug}}: URL slug of the category page
placeholders.{{focus_keyword}}: Primary focus keyword for Rank Math
placeholders.{{secondary_keywords}}: Comma-separated Rank Math extra keywords from approved pool (top 4)
placeholders.{{category_context}}: Optional one-sentence context for this category type
placeholders.{{platform_context}}: Optional platform or network context sentence
placeholders.{{internal_links}}: Optional pre-built HTML internal link list
placeholders.{{safe_live_context}}: Optional safe framing sentence about live availability
placeholders.{{content_terms}}: Comma-separated content keyword terms from approved pool (beyond top 4, up to 16)

_meta.selection_rule: Deterministic: abs(crc32(post_id . category_slug . section_key)) mod variant_count

live_cam_and_model_discovery_tips.label: Live Cam and Model Discovery Tips

variants.h2: Live Cam and Model Discovery Tips
variants.body: When browsing live cam profiles under {{category_name}}, a few habits make the process faster. Check a profile's availability section first — this tells you which platforms the performer is listed on so you know where to look before clicking outbound. If a room shows as offline on one platform, the model may be live on another listed platform. Use the profile's internal links rather than searching directly on the platform to avoid landing on unrelated accounts.

variants.h2: Live Cam and Model Discovery Tips
variants.body: Finding live models in {{category_name}} is easier when you use profile pages as your starting point rather than platform searches. The profile pages on {{site_name}} include direct links to listed platform accounts, so you skip the step of filtering through similarly-named performers on a crowded platform directory. Open the profile, check the platform links, and follow the one that matches your preference.

variants.h2: Live Cam and Model Discovery Tips
variants.body: Model discovery in {{category_name}} works best when you combine the directory overview with the individual profile detail pages. The overview shows you the range of performers available; the profile pages tell you which platforms each model uses, what their schedule looks like if listed, and what related content is available. Use both layers rather than relying on one alone.

variants.h2: Live Cam and Model Discovery Tips
variants.body: A few practical tips for discovering {{category_name}} performers: start with the Models Directory to see who is listed, open profiles for models who look relevant, and check the platform links on each profile before clicking outbound. If you are interested in a specific performer across multiple visits, bookmarking their {{site_name}} profile page may be more consistent than bookmarking a platform page directly, since platform URLs can change.

variants.h2: Live Cam and Model Discovery Tips
variants.body: Discovering the right {{category_name}} model takes less time when you use the site's existing tagging and linking structure. Most model profiles link to related profiles in the same category, so if your first choice is offline you can move to a similar performer quickly. The video pages connected to this category also provide a useful reference point for finding performers whose style you might enjoy in a live context.

variants.h2: Live Cam and Model Discovery Tips
variants.body: When looking for live webcam sessions in {{category_name}}, check a profile's listed platform links and note the display name shown for each. Searching directly on the platform for that exact display name is more practical than searching by description alone. The profile page on {{site_name}} exists to give you that listed handle so your search on the platform starts from the right place.

variants.h2: Live Cam and Model Discovery Tips
variants.body: For model discovery in {{category_name}}, the most useful starting point is a profile page rather than a platform search. Profile pages on {{site_name}} include listed platform links, which reduces the chance of navigating to an unrelated account with a similar name. From there, follow the listed platform link directly or search on the platform using the name shown on the profile.

variants.h2: Live Cam and Model Discovery Tips
variants.body: Live availability in {{category_name}} varies by performer and by time of day. Rather than checking a platform directly, use the model profile pages on {{site_name}} as your first stop — they show which platforms each performer uses and may include context about typical availability. That context is more useful than a real-time status check that may have changed by the time you click through.

what_to_check_before_opening_profile.label: What to Check Before Opening a Profile

variants.h2: What to Check Before Opening a Profile
variants.body: Before opening a model profile from {{category_name}}, it is worth taking a moment to review what the profile page includes. Look for the platform links section, which tells you which sites the performer uses. Check whether a schedule or availability note is present. Review the bio section if available, as it provides context that is not always visible on the platform page itself. This preparation reduces the chance of clicking through to an offline room or an unrelated account.

variants.h2: What to Check Before Opening a Profile
variants.body: When you land on a {{category_name}} profile page, check that the platform links shown match the performer you are looking for before clicking outbound. Some platform names are common across many accounts, so reviewing the handle shown on the profile page can help you reach the right destination. Use the destination platform to check current status.

variants.h2: What to Check Before Opening a Profile
variants.body: Before clicking through from a {{category_name}} profile, check the listed platforms and note the handle for each one. If the performer has multiple platform entries, the profile page will indicate which are live-room destinations and which are fan or support pages. Following the right type of link for your intent — live room versus fan content — saves time and avoids a dead end on an offline page.

variants.h2: What to Check Before Opening a Profile
variants.body: A few things are worth reviewing before opening any profile from the {{category_name}} category. First, check that the profile name matches who you are looking for. Second, look at the platform list to see which services the model uses. Third, if a schedule is available, check it before committing to a click-through. These steps take less than a minute and make the browsing experience more efficient.

variants.h2: What to Check Before Opening a Profile
variants.body: Profile pages under {{category_name}} contain more information than is visible from the category listing. Before navigating to a platform link, open the full profile to review availability details, platform handles, and any bio context provided. This extra step is especially useful when you are choosing between multiple similar performers and want to compare what each one offers before making a decision.

variants.h2: What to Check Before Opening a Profile
variants.body: When browsing {{category_name}} profiles, take note of the platform links available for each performer before clicking outbound. If a model has accounts on more than one platform, the profile page will list them separately. Deciding which platform to use before you click — based on your preferred interface or existing account — means fewer redirects and a smoother experience once you arrive.

variants.h2: What to Check Before Opening a Profile
variants.body: Before following a link from a {{category_name}} profile to an external platform, check that you are on the correct profile page for the performer you want. Look at the display name, bio, and any platform handles listed. Comparing those details against what you see after you click through can help you reach the right account. This is a straightforward precaution worth building into your browsing habit regardless of which category you use.

variants.h2: What to Check Before Opening a Profile
variants.body: {{category_name}} profile pages include a platform links section that is the most important thing to check before clicking outbound. That section lists available destinations rather than inferred ones, so use it as your primary navigation tool. If you see multiple platforms listed, match the type of link — live room, fan page, social profile — to what you are actually looking for before you follow it.
